Just different thoughts.

data.body:
5 years ago today, I was injured at work and severed two of my fingers. My ring finger was partially amputated and my middle finger was semi-repaired with a graft. 

I used to care SO MUCH about this day and this injury but now? It's so unimportant. I used to even be afraid of posting pictures 🤷‍♀️

data.body:
Today I finished a project to show in my BFC panel, something I concepted, designed, and put together with storebought parts.

I'm proud of myself, having made it without complicating things nor reinventing the wheel, and that it can actually work for me.

I even ended my day with a healthy snack. 🥰
